This Top Secret sealed MS & D" packet
with your newsletter contains a complete
"Swipe & Deploy" Sample of a tested,
proven, universally applicable marketing item...
One month it may be a direct mail piece, another something to use at a website, another
seasonal program, another a complete tele-seminar or webinar campaign, etc. etc.
Our goal is to get as close to handing you a Turn-key, Ready-To-Use
Marketing/Promotional Tool as is possible, given there are literally thousands of different
kinds of businesses making Glazer-Kennedy Insider's Circle™ membership. To anyone who
uses just one of these a year, this at least QUADRUPLES THE VALUE OF
MEMBERSHIP, and makes every month a quick-to-moneymaking-action month.
IMPORT/ANT NOTE: These are intended ONLY for use of GKIC Members
Further, 	whenever 	possible, 	helpful 	vendors, 	suppliers 	or 	facilitators 	will 	be 	provided
should you wish to use them.
This month's "S & D" example is...
Mobile Marketing
(a.k.a. Text Messaging)

-- 1 of 9 --

*
STOP: Before I tell you about Mobile Marketing I want to demonstrate it to you
and make it worth your while with a BIG BRIBE. So follow these 4 easy steps:
1 . 	G e t 	o u t 	y o u r 	c e l l 	p h o n e 	_ ^
2. Text the keyword "GKIC" to 94932
3. Wait a few seconds for a reply with a SPECIAL code
4. Read below to reveal your REWARD
What is Mobile Marketing?
Mobile Marketing is the next wave of communication...or is it a tsunami?
Text messaging will change the way we sell products, provide services, support customers and
communicate for the foreseeable future. This cost effective technology has just begun.
In 2006 only 13.5 million text messages were sent per month. In June of 2009 that number grew to
13.5 billion worldwide. This number is projected to double within the next two years.
Advantages of Mobile Marketing
Mobile Marketing provides many advantages to your communications and marketing strategies.
Some unique benefits include:
Measurable results
Enhanced Marketing
Direct Communications
Increased Customer Loyalty
Increased Sales
Simple & Effective
Consumer driven
Spam free
Improve any campaign
Text Alerts (You can send Emergency Alerts, important company information, promotional
announcements, and project updates through a simple text. Text alerts are read more often
than email. They are less intrusive and less time consuming than a phone call.)
Industry Case Studies:
1. Restaurants
The restaurant industry is filled with many variables that can affect business. Some variables include
weather, seasons, location and service. It is important for restaurants to keep their tables filled with
their guests. Mobile Marketing enables restaurant managers to communicate immediately and directly
with their customers. For example, a rainy day may keep people at home, but by using Mobile
Marketing a restaurant can send a text message coupon offering customers a rainy day special - a
bowl of warm soup for a deeply discounted price
How are restaurants using Mobile Marketing?
• Mobile Coupons: Buy any entree and get a free appetizer today only. Show phone for special.
• Meal Specials: Today's special - 8oz. sirloin, fries and soda only $6.99. See you soon.

-- 2 of 9 --

New Menu Item Notifications: Come try our delicious new 16oz. garlic peppercorn steak and our new grilled
salmon.
Table Availability Notifications: Your table is now available. Please come to the reception desk.
Eating Contests: We are having our 10th annual hot dog eating contest this Friday night 7pm.
Raffles: Congratulations! You have won a $40 gift card. Please come into any of our restaurant locations to claim
prize.
Birthday Special Reminders: Happy Birthday! Come in today and have any dessert FREE!
Restaurant Text message Example: H a p p y B i r t h d a y l
Com* In today and
havo any dossorf FREEI
2. Real Estate:
Thousands of real estate brokers and agents use Mobile Marketing technology to offer on-demand
property info and drive more sales through Mobile Virtual Tours and Instant Agent Notification! In
r today's property market, direct communication between buyer and seller is vital. Providing information	to potential buyers while they are viewing property is essential to success.
With Mobile Marketing, home buyers receive property information via text. A buyer sends a simple
text message to the broker or agent from the comfort of their cars or while standing in front of the
home for sale. Within seconds, they receive an instant reply, including property information including:
• Agent contact info
• 	Property 	Description
• Mobile Virtual Tour with all MLS information including pictures!
• Photos of the home and more...
At the same moment, the agent is notified via email or Text Message that the buyer is looking at the
Mobile Virtual Tour. The agent may then call or text the buyer to immediately set up a showing. The
buyer may also reply to the text message to request more information via email. Agents receive a
buyer's contact information as soon as the Mobile Virtual Tour is received so agents can close more
sales, more quickly. Never create and print another flyer or fill (and refill) a brochure box again. Once
the property sells, simply reuse the property code and sign rider on the next sale.
• An engaging listing tool - win more listings
• Generate more leads without referral fees
• Respond immediately to qualified leads
• Forget filling brochure boxes forever
How are realtors using Mobile Marketing?
Instant Home Descriptions: 3,000 sq. ft. home. 5 bed, 3.5 baths & fireplace. Priced at 250K.

-- 3 of 9 --

• Links to Website(s) & Virtual Tours: Beautiful new home visit www.home.com to view a virtual tour of this home
and to learn more information on this home.
• New Property Listing Alerts: Check out my new listings at www.home.com. Call 123.555.2222 to schedule a
viewing.
• Sales Incentives/Contests: The realtor that sells the most listings this quarter will receive a $2,000 bonus. Good '
luck and have fun!
Real Estate Text message Example: 3,000 sq. ft. home. 5
bed, 3.5 bath's &
fi r e p l a c e . C u s t o m
cabinets and a full
furnished basement.
Priced at 250K.
-"- O
3. Sales i
Success in the direct sales industry is often dictated on individual client interactions and networking.
Mobile Marketing enables individuals involved with direct sales to establish and maintain a unique,
direct connection with their customers and individuals within their organization or business. Mobile
Marketing helps Direct Sales Marketers save time and focus more time on building their personal
network and business by helping to automate and streamline time consuming customer
communication processes.
How are the Direct Sales Marketers using it?
• Appointment Reminders: Remember our lunch appointment at noon to discuss opportunities and the structure
of our business. See you soon.
• Special Promotion Notifications: Make sure you place your monthly order by the 15th to receive a 20%
discount on your total product order!
• Meeting Reminders: Remember to get your friends on the conference call tonight at 7pm.
• Inventory Control: Discounted products available. Products up to 50% off.
• Contests: This month whoever signs up the most new customers will win a 3-day vacation.
• Raffles: Congratulations! You have won a $40 gift card. Please call 123.555.2222 to claim prize.
• Internal Communication: Remember this month's goal is to sign up 5 new customers. You still have 10 days left.
You can do it!
• Networking: Come to my house party this Friday night to meet new people.

-- 4 of 9 --

4. Business / Retail
^ Mobile Marketing allows retailers to communicate information directly to their customers. Retailers
can send out messages that are relevant and reach their customers, helping to drive traffic to their
store(s) and increase sales. People take their cell phone with them wherever they go making text
messaging a great way to keep individuals informed and updated on special promotions, new product
arrivals and contests. Mobile Marketing provides retailers the ability to establish and maintain
invaluable connections with their customers.
How are businesses using it?
Mobile Coupons: Come in today and show your phone to receive 30% off any item in the store.
Exclusive Discounts, Specials and Store News: Buy one sweater get on one free. Today only! Show your
phone to get discount. Forward to your friends
Inventory Control: Inventory sale today! Buy any last year's model snowboard and get your choice of bindings
free. Come take advantage of this sale!
Sale Notifications: This weekend will be our annual blow out sale. Visit our website to see some of the deals
available this weekend, www.xyz.com.
Contest: Be sure to enter the Skateboard Competition this weekend sponsored by Five-0 Skate
Retail Text message Example:
5. Education
Inventory clear out sals
today! Buy any last
y o a r ' s m o d e l s n o w b o a r d
and gal your choice
of bindings free.
Come take advantage of
this sale!
Mobile Marketing provides education institutions (such as schools) with a simple, reliable and
convenient means of communication by connecting them to its students, parents and employees
through mobile phones and text messaging. People carry their cell phones with them wherever they
go, making it the easiest and most effective way to deliver important information. When schools use
Mobile Marketing, parents will feel confident knowing they will be notified immediately of an
emergency and be kept informed and updated.
How are Educational Institutions using it?
Emergency Alerts/Notifications: There is a fire in the campus library and it has been evacuated.
School Closures (weather/power outage): School is closed today due to heavy snow and closed roads.
Visit www.school55.com for more info.
School Events: The district science fair will be this Friday @ 7pm. Come and see the many interesting
projects the students are displaying,
Fundraising: Please remember to make your school donation online @ www.donation.com
Meeting Reminders: Parent teacher conferences will be held this Thursday @5pm

RECOMMENDED 	RESOURCE 	For 	Mobile 	Marketing 	(a.k.a. 	Text
Messaging):
IntellaText, a division of Intell2 has developed a very low-cost platform to set up Mobile Marketing campaigns
and deliver text messaging for ANY business. As a GKIC Member you can receive a FREE 30-minute "one-on-
one" consultation with one of their IntellaText experts and when you follow the 4 steps above and text GKIC
to 94932 you automatically receive a special code to place on the enclosed FAX BACK Form that will also waive
the $79 Set-Up Fee and waive the 1st month's monthly use fee (A $218.00 value). Simply fax back the form
within your S&D sealed envelope.
Below, are answers to the MOST FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS they receive. I thought you would find them
helpful.
How does Mobile Marketing work? You can place marketing keywords on your vehicles, business cards, real estate, etc. These
advertisements direct mobile users to send a text message with your keyword to 12345. There will be an auto-response with a
personalized message (coupon, promotion etc.) you now have a new contact to send proactive outbound marketing messages to.
What are Keywords? Keywords are how you identify one campaign from another. Mobile phone users looking to receive **\
information from you will text message a keyword, such as TRAVEL to 12345. Your customer will automatically get a response with
your personalized message/promotion related to the keyword that was sent.

-- 6 of 9 --

What are campaigns? Campaigns are how you communicate with your potential & existing customers. Campaigns can either be
inbound or outbound. For inbound campaigns, you can place marketing messages in various places to prompt potential customers to
opt-in to receive information from you immediately or opt-in to receive information in the future.
What does Opt-in/Opt-out mean?
Opt-in- Means that a mobile user has sent a keyword to your SMS Marketing account to subscribe to receive text
coupons/promotions etc. from you.
Opt-out- Means that a mobile phone user has sent an opt-out keyword such as; STOP, UNSUBSCRIBE, QUIT, CANCEL or END to
unsubscribe from your opt-in list. From this point on you can no longer send them text marketing messages, unless they opt-in
again.
Is there a limit to the number of messages I can send at a time/in a day/to one recipient?
Answer: No, there is no limitation on the frequency of sending your promotion/coupon messages; we take an anti SPAM approach in
Text marketing. Consumers must subscribe to your opt in list before you can send any Text messages to them. IntellaText
recommends a once a month promotion, or a weekly text message blast. Unless you notify the subscriber of more frequent
messages, this helps your subscriber retention.
Are there any set-up costs?
Answer: Yes. There is a 1-time, $79 set up fee, but it is WAIVED for GKIC Members
What is a short code?
It is a 5 or 6 digit number, such as 12345. It is faster & easier to respond to than full cell phone #.
How often can I send new promotions or alerts to my subscriber list?
The Mobile Marketing Association recommends no more than 2 per week. However, we don't limit you.
What is IntellaText SMS?
IntellaText SMS is a mass mobile delivery tool that uses text messaging to disseminate information to consumers, employees, and
other subscribers IntellaText SMS can be utilized to communicate any time sensitive information via text to 1 person, 1000 or to over
100,000 people with the click of a button.
How does Text Marketing work?
You can place marketing keywords on your vehicles, business cards, real estate, etc. These advertisements direct mobile users send
a text message with your keyword to 41513. There will be an auto-response with a personalized message (coupon, promotion etc..)
you now have a new contact to send proactive outbound marketing messages to.
IntellaTextSMS Text Messaging Flow
• Almost all adults in the US own a mobile
phone making them accessible to text
messaging.
• Fact: Americans sent over 90 billion test
messages last month - outnumbering
voice calls by over 3-1!
• Over 94% of every text message sent
will be read & they cannot be blocked,
filtered or ignored.
• Text messages are usually received
within seconds of sending, making this is
an extremely fast method of delivery.
• SMS Marketing is cheaper and quicker
than traditional methods of
communication & and more reliable
than email.
Anonymous Interaction
Direct
Relationship]
Discrete Consumer Persona! Knowledge Databases

-- 7 of 9 --

• Mobile phones allow your IntellaTextSMS campaign to be delivered wherever the subscriber is & whatever they
are doing.
• Complete control over when the subscriber will receive & read your SMS campaign.
• 	P e o p l e 	d o n ' t 	h a v e 	t o 	s t o p 	w h a t 	t h e y 	a r e 	d o i n g 	t o 	r e a d 	a 	t e x t 	m e s s a g e . 	^ ^
• SMS Marketing allows you to respond to real time events and promotions. This allows you to compile and deliver your
message instantly.
How long do I own my Keywords?
Answer: For as long as you continue to subscribe. If you cancel your account, your keyword becomes available
for others to register.
Can I cancel or change plans?
Answer: Our service is provided on a month to month basis. You can change plans or cancel at any time.
Be sure to cancel or change your plan before your monthly renewal date. We do not give partial month
refunds.
Do you charge for Inbound messages?
Answer: No. We only count outbound Mobile Terminated (MT) messages. We do NOT charge for inbound
Mobile Originated (MO) messages.

TO CLAIM THE FREE OFFER:
I. Get out your cell phone
2.Text the keyword 'GKIC to 94932
3. Enter the coupon code you'll receive
instantly via text
Enter 	Your 	Coupon 	Code
I placed a sign in the window of my restaurant advertising to text Greenfields (my keyword) to
short code 41513 to receive a discount on their next visit. This brought in a lot of business and
built a list of my customers. Then on slow nights I send a message out to the list that they will
receive 50% off their second entree of equal or lesser value simply by showing the message on
their phone. Business increased by 18% on those nights.
Robert Greenfield - Greenfields Restaurant
